description: P5 path-safety zone policy. This file separates normal blocked space, charging/rest zones, and the special bump guard zone. Charging-zone centers represent actual charging/rest positions; script initial poses are separate.

blocked_zone.meaning: Normal robot paths must not enter or cross this zone.

charging_zone.meaning: Robot may start/end here for charging or rest. A robot may leave its own charging zone or enter its own charging zone, but this is not treated as general open walking space.

bump_guard_zone.meaning: Special rectangle around the floor bump. Normal mobility.move must not cross it. Crossing is legal only through in2out/out2in macros.

charging_zones.name: alpha_charging_zone
charging_zones.note: This is the actual charging/rest restriction zone. The script initial pose for this robot is expected to be manually moved to y=4.4 before the experiment starts.

charging_zones.name: bravo_charging_zone
charging_zones.note: This is the actual charging/rest restriction zone. The script initial pose for this robot is expected to be manually moved to y=4.4 before the experiment starts.

charging_zones.name: charlie_charging_zone
charging_zones.note: This is the actual charging/rest restriction zone. The script initial pose for this robot is expected to be manually moved to y=4.4 before the experiment starts.

charging_zones.name: delta_charging_zone
charging_zones.note: This is the actual charging/rest restriction zone. The script initial pose for this robot is expected to be manually moved to y=4.4 before the experiment starts.

restriction_map_policy.source: site restriction map, to be wired in P5 implementation
restriction_map_policy.charging_zone_override: Charging zones remain restricted and are already covered by restriction_map.npy. Script initial poses should normally be outside charging zones, e.g. y=4.4 for the current rough DemoRoom setup.
